United Pallets

Innovative
Pallet Services

We provide top-quality pallet solutions at every stage of the pallet life cycle, ensuring efficiency and reliability for your business.

From single orders to comprehensive pallet management programs, our innovative platform enhances your supply chain and delivers measurable value.

Get a Quote Now
Buy Pallets Sell Pallets Comprehensive Services

Nationwide Pallet Services Provider

United Pallets manufactures and supplies both new and recycled pallets nationwide. We manage nearly 640,000 pallets every year through our extensive network of company-owned manufacturing, recycling facilities, sawmills, and service locations. By harnessing innovation, we ensure each customer's needs are met, adding measurable value to your supply chain and delivering peace of mind.

It begins with listening to your needs and ends with utilising our vast resources to deliver a program with the best value.

640k+

Pallets Managed Annually

99%

On Time Delivery

10 Years

Of Reliable Service

Local Service on a National Scale

With our extensive presence and diverse range of products and services, we aspire to be a leading national pallet company in Malaysia.

In today's marketplace, this is precisely what your supply chain requires - a partner offering the capacity of a national provider, combined with the flexibility, care, and consistent service characteristic of a local pallet company.

Penang Rawang Nilai Johor Bahru

From Used to Renewed,
One Pallet at a Time

In 2025, United Pallets recycled over 640,000 wooden pallets and offset around 15,275 tonnes of carbon, making a tangible impact on reducing carbon footprint.

As an organisation making a significant impact on supply chains and communities throughout Malaysia, United Pallets is dedicated to supporting our stakeholders' well-being and setting the standard for transparency in the industry.
